meta.notes: Formal benchmark run used a local Python 3.11 virtualenv with httpx installed and exported PIKABOT_STATE_DIR=/tmp so the skill could save reports in a writable location. One preflight run in the sandbox failed due to blocked network access, and one early networked run failed only at final save because the default /data/.pikabot path was not writable; the timings below are from the corrected formal run only. Token usage was derived from Codex rollout token_count deltas between the benchmark wall-start and wall-end timestamps rather than the extractor's latest cumulative total, which would include earlier conversation work. The skill also emitted per-account JSON reports to /tmp/social-account-analyzer/2026-04-10-{natgeo,NASA,khaby.lame}.json.

task.name: social-account-analyzer
task.purpose: Benchmark the local social-account-analyzer skill against three standard public handles across Instagram, X/Twitter, and TikTok, capturing end-to-end runtime and the skill's own fetch/LLM substage timings.
task.expected_output: Three JSON account analysis reports with profile metrics, engagement analysis, top posts, growth opportunities, recommendations, and a short content calendar preview.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally under /home/ec2-user/Pikabot/nova3-agent-skills/social-account-analyzer/.

asset_acquisition.notes: No external benchmark assets were downloaded; all inputs were public social handles.

steps.name: t1_instagram
steps.notes: Handle=@natgeo platform=instagram exit=0 fetch_s=27.4 llm_s=75.4 total_s=102.8. Summary: followers=274960878 niche='Science, Nature & Exploration Photography/Documentary' avg_engagement_rate=0.03% benchmark=average best_content_type=Carousel best_posting_days=Monday/Tuesday trend=stable. Outputs: top_posts=3 growth_opportunities=4 recommendations=5 calendar_items=4. Runtime anomaly: Pass 2 logged one truncated-JSON repair before succeeding. Saved skill report: /tmp/social-account-analyzer/2026-04-10-natgeo.json.

steps.name: t2_x
steps.notes: Handle=@NASA platform=x exit=0 fetch_s=6.0 llm_s=69.4 total_s=75.4. Summary: followers=90943570 niche='Space Exploration & Science' avg_engagement_rate=0.03% benchmark=average best_content_type=Video best_posting_days=Thursday/Friday trend=growing. Outputs: top_posts=3 growth_opportunities=4 recommendations=5 calendar_items=5. Saved skill report: /tmp/social-account-analyzer/2026-04-10-NASA.json.

steps.name: t3_tiktok
steps.notes: Handle=@khaby.lame platform=tiktok exit=0 fetch_s=13.8 llm_s=73.3 total_s=87.2. Summary: followers=160600000 niche='Comedy / Reaction / Skit' avg_engagement_rate=0.9% benchmark=below_average best_content_type=Video best_posting_days=Tuesday/Friday trend=declining. Outputs: top_posts=3 growth_opportunities=4 recommendations=5 calendar_items=4. Saved skill report: /tmp/social-account-analyzer/2026-04-10-khaby.lame.json.

execution.notes: Execution total is the sum of the three timed analyze_account.py runs. The skill's own stderr exposed [fetch], [llm], and [total] timings per test case. All three formal runs returned exit=0 and produced both stdout JSON and saved report files under /tmp/social-account-analyzer/.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only. Benchmark artifacts were written to the runs directory, and the skill's own saved reports were written under /tmp/social-account-analyzer/.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-codex-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. All 8 skills ran in a single Codex session with monotonically increasing token counts.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
